description: Create a Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\pcap_triage consisting of protocols.talon-list, pcap_triage.py, and pcap_triage.talon. The module must implement a voice command 'block protocol <user.network_protocol>' that invokes an action 'user.generate_blocklist(port: str)'. The list 'user.network_protocol' should map the phrases 'secure shell' (22), 'web' (80), 'secure web' (443), 'remote desktop' (3389), 'domain name' (53), and 'file transfer' (21) to their port numbers. The action must read C:\workspace\data\network_traffic.csv (headers: Timestamp,SourceIP,DestinationIP,DestinationPort,Protocol,Bytes), extract unique SourceIPs where the DestinationPort matches the input port, and append them to C:\workspace\data\firewall_rules.txt in the format 'deny in from <SourceIP> to any'.
